description: Daloopa provides financial and fundamental market data, including company models, fundamentals, filings, and related datasets for investment workflows. Its products also support access through AI-agent integrations such as MCP.
summary: Daloopa exposes a Basic-authenticated REST API at `https://app.daloopa.com/api/v2` and a streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.daloopa.com/server/mcp`, with MCP access via OAuth or API-key-based methods.
